docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDENHALL, JANICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-07-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-29-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDENHALL, JANICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST CABLE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-18-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-03-2012 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDENHALL, JANICE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
POS; RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDENHALL, JANICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDENHALL, JANICE SERVED APR-10-2012, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST CABLE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-18-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-29-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-07-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
